title: cyclosorus omeiensis
intro: Cyclosorus omeiensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, Cyclosorus omeiensis has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus omeiensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of gastroenteritis. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus omeiensis is often used as a decoction or an infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
